overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit plaza with towering glass skyscrapers, transitioning to a high-speed sequence along a covered multi-level highway. The environment showcases futuristic architecture, vibrant holographic advertisements, and reflective wet surfaces throughout the night-time urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the illuminated glass skyscraper, passing by planters and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead of ego toward the plaza center

entered.detail: tall red-brick building with prominent red neon signage reading 'kabayan'
towering modern glass building with vertical illuminated windows rising into the night sky
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting neon lights and building illumination
large rectangular planter containing small palm trees and greenery
illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open neon-lit plaza at night, with the camera following a character walking toward a massive glass skyscraper. The Kabayan building stands prominently on the right with bright red signage, while wet pavement reflects the vibrant purple and yellow neon lights. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the atmosphere is calm and cyberpunk-aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza area approaching overpass structure

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the approaching overpass structure, reducing direct neon illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza as the environment transitions toward a covered area, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction, gradually moving ahead of ego

entered.detail: large concrete and steel elevated highway structure with support columns
brightly lit yellow building front with large illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward an imposing overpass structure that begins to dominate the left side of the frame, casting shadows across the plaza. The Kabayan building recedes behind as the camera moves forward, while a yellow-lit building emerges on the right. The lighting shifts from open neon exposure to mixed shadow as the covered area approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass, transitioning from open plaza to enclosed walkway

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, moving through a covered pedestrian corridor with artificial lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the crosswalk markings, waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns holding up the overpass structure
yellow and white painted zebra stripes on the pavement indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway beneath the highway overpass, with massive concrete support pillars lining the left side. Artificial lighting replaces the open neon glow, and crosswalk markings appear on the pavement. A pedestrian waits near the crossing ahead as the environment becomes more enclosed and industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered multi-lane highway with suspended lighting

events.description: accelerating from walking pace to high vehicle speed along the highway corridor
transitioning from pedestrian walkway to vehicle roadway with active traffic

agents.ego_description: traveling at high speed along the covered highway, navigating between lanes of traffic and passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving in the left lane, maintaining speed with ego
black sedan overtaking on the right side, moving faster than ego

entered.detail: enclosed multi-level highway tunnel with overhead lighting fixtures and structural beams
row of palm trees planted in the center median of the highway, extending into the distance
stream of vehicles including cars and vans traveling in both directions along the highway
line of parked vehicles along the left side of the highway corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a high-speed sequence along a covered multi-lane highway, with the camera moving rapidly through the enclosed corridor. Palm trees line the center median while vehicles pass by in both directions. The environment is fully sheltered with artificial overhead lighting, creating a tunnel-like effect as the camera accelerates through the futuristic roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza into a high-speed journey through a sheltered futuristic highway. It begins by following a character across wet pavement reflecting purple and yellow lights toward a massive glass skyscraper with bright red signage. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza gives way to the looming shadow of an imposing overpass, shifting the lighting from vibrant neon exposure to a mix of deep shadows and yellow glows. The scene then narrows into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway lined with massive concrete pillars and industrial artificial lighting before turning toward a crosswalk. Finally, the environment transforms into a high-speed corridor as the camera accelerates along a covered multi-lane highway, rushing past center-median palm trees and passing vehicles under a tunnel-like canopy of overhead lights.
